channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 'Horrific': At least 117 dead dogs found at California 'no-kill' shelter
item.description: Authorities reported that many of the dead dogs had gunshot wounds.

item.title: Senate duo promotes bipartisanship as nation marks 250th anniversary
item.description: Jonathan Karl interviews Sens. Mark Kelly and Todd Young, and author Rye Barcott about unity.

item.title: Alan Jackson delivers emotional farewell concert
item.description: Five years ago, Jackson revealed he has Charcot-Marie-Tooth disease, a degenerative nerve condition.

item.title: LGBTQ+ Pride parades scheduled for Sunday in NYC and San Francisco
